## Validation

- [ ] Tests/lint/typecheck run (or not needed for this change)
- [ ] Any manual verification steps are documented in the PR description

## Documentation

- [ ] I reviewed the markdown rulebook: `docs/plans/active/md-governance-rulebook/companions/MD_RULEBOOK.md`
- [ ] If behavior/contracts changed, I updated the owning active plan `Update Log`
- [ ] If plan manifests changed, I ran `pnpm docs:plans:sync` and included generated updates
- [ ] I ran `pnpm docs:plans:check`
- [ ] I ran `STRICT_PLAN_DOCS=1 pnpm docs:plans:check`
- [ ] I did not introduce a parallel canonical doc for an existing topic
- [ ] If docs moved, old paths now contain a forward-pointer stub
